report.summary: UX audit of 2 new build-cycle pages (Starknet, ETF In-Kind), created 4 missing OG images, added breadcrumb navigation to both new pages, and fixed OG image references on 2 additional pages (Citrea, Paradex).

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: Added breadcrumb navigation (Home > Learn > Page Title) to starknet-validity-rollup-guide-2026 — was missing nav context for users arriving from search
Added breadcrumb navigation to crypto-etf-in-kind-redemption-guide-2026 — same missing nav context issue
Both breadcrumbs include aria-label='Breadcrumb' for screen reader accessibility
Breadcrumbs use inline styles consistent with each page's styling approach (matching existing design system)
Audit finding: Both new pages use inline styles while older pages (citrea) use Tailwind — noted for future consistency pass
Audit finding: Neither new page includes BackToTop component — lower priority since pages are ~350 lines (medium scroll depth)

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: starknet-validity-rollup-guide-2026 (1200x630 SVG) — purple/cyan accent, stats: $542M TVL, 47K+ users, 1.1B+ STRK staked, 1,700+ BTC
OG image: crypto-etf-in-kind-redemption-guide-2026 (1200x630 SVG) — green/blue accent, stats: SEC July 2025, $50B+ flows, All BTC & ETH, Deferred Gains
OG image: citrea-guide (1200x630 SVG) — orange/yellow accent, stats: $96M TVL, 30+ dApps, cBTC, ctUSD
OG image: paradex-zk-perpetuals-guide (1200x630 SVG) — pink/purple accent, stats: Perp DEX, Starknet, Self-Custodial, ZK-STARKs

sections.title: Code Fixes
items: Updated citrea-bitcoin-zk-rollup-guide-2026 OG image references from .png to .svg (2 occurrences) — was pointing to non-existent file
Updated paradex-zk-perpetuals-guide-2026 OG image references from .png to .svg (3 occurrences) — was pointing to non-existent file
